message:
test(core): property-based tests for approval token invariants (wa-0r1c)

23 proptest properties covering fingerprint_for_input determinism/format/
sensitivity to all input fields, hash_allow_once_code determinism/format/
collision resistance, ApprovalScope::from_input field preservation,
ApprovalAuditContext defaults, and ApprovalConfig serde roundtrip.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
